title: MultAttnAttrib: Training-Free Multimodal Attribution in Long Document Question Answering
innovation_summary: MultAttnAttrib: Training-Free Multimodal Attribution in Long Document Question Answering: As a result, we introduce MultAttnAttrib, a training-free attribution-generation method that leverages a model's prefill pass, selected attention heads, and calibrated thresholds to locate source evidence.
